description: Displays a chronological timeline of activity entries (comments, status changes, assignments, attachments) with author avatars, relative timestamps, and color-coded connector dots per entry type. Entries are sorted newest-first.

examples.title: With ref for programmatic refresh
examples.code:
<TmActivityTimeline @ref="_timelineRef" Entries="@entries" />

@code {
    private TmActivityTimeline? _timelineRef;
    async Task Refresh() => await _timelineRef!.RefreshAsync();
}
